plugins.name: nexacro-claude-skills
plugins.description: Nexacro utility skill bundle — xfdl build/deploy, data format references (XML/SSV/JSON), and xfdl authoring helpers.

plugins.name: nexacro-webflux-port
plugins.description: Playbook for porting Spring Boot/MVC Nexacro modules (xapi/xeni/uiadapter) to Spring WebFlux. Classpath shim, ServletProvider, multipart dispatch, paramOf equivalence, WebFilter bypass, ResultHandler ordering, base-path and static resource mapping.
